name: SubsPlease FileStore Bypass
description: Telegram bot that tracks SubsPlease anime releases, downloads via magnet, enriches metadata, and serves files via Telegram file share links — bypassing traditional filestore hosting.

DB_CHANNEL_ID.description: Channel ID where files are stored (e.g. -1001234567890)

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string (Atlas free tier works)

TARGET_CHAT_ID.description: Optional: Chat ID to auto-post new releases (leave empty to disable)

FILE_SUFFIX_TAG.description: Suffix tag appended in filename after [ESUB]

ENCODE_QUALITY.description: Encode quality override (auto, 480, 720, 1080, hdrip). 'auto' uses RSS release quality.

POST_CAPTION.description: HTML caption template for target channel posts. Placeholders: {anime_name}, {season}, {episode}, {quality_list}, {genre}

UPSTREAM_REPO.description: GitHub repo URL to pull updates from on each restart

UPSTREAM_BRANCH.description: Branch to track for upstream updates
